title: Procedure child evaluations inherit parent actor context
description: Bind runtime actor context at procedure execution boundary and pass parent client/account into procedure-triggered evaluation runs so child Evaluation records keep deterministic createdByUserId + metadata.attribution.requestUserId.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: 1) bind actor context around ProcedureService execute_procedure call, 2) pass parent client/account into run_accuracy_evaluation in _run_evaluation_for_procedure, 3) add/extend focused tests for wiring + attribution propagation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented core propagation changes: ProcedureService now resolves actor from client context and wraps execute_procedure inside set_runtime_actor_context; _run_evaluation_for_procedure now passes client=self.client and account_id to run_accuracy_evaluation. Added tests in plexus/cli/procedure/test_service_actor_attribution.py for both behaviors, and extended evaluation attribution assertion to include metadata.attribution.requestUserId. Local focused tests passed: test_service_actor_attribution.py (2), evaluation_test.py (6). execute_test actor-context subset could not run in this shell due missing fastmcp dependency.
